allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: complete email system overhaul with dual-provider support and 23 templates

- Add dual email provider \(Gmail SMTP + Resend API\) with runtime switching via admin panel
- Implement IEmailProvider/IEmailProviderFactory factory pattern for provider abstraction
- Rewrite IEmailService to 2-method interface: SendTemplatedEmailAsync + SendRawEmailAsync
- Add 23 Turkish email templates with responsive HTML layout, seeded on startup
- Refactor all 20+ command handlers to use template-based emails with EmailTemplateKeys constants
- Add new email triggers: welcome, booking cancel/complete, reschedule, dispute, group class, course, review, verification, payout
- Add admin API endpoints: test email, template toggle-active, template preview with sample variables
- Extend PlatformSettings with email_provider, resend_api_key, resend_from_email, resend_from_name
- Update DI registration to use EmailProviderFactory instead of EmailOptions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
